question: Where should a project-local skill live if you want it versioned with the repository?
What is the main auto-activation signal Claude uses when deciding whether to load a skill?
Why did the original dataset-publisher skill fail to fire on the Q&A-sharing prompt?
answer_a: The skill body was too short
answer_c: The description defined the skill but did not describe natural trigger situations
answer_d: Claude Code only loads plugin skills automatically

question: In the minimal starter from Inside the Box, what does load_skills(...) do?
answer_a: Calls the language model to rank skills
answer_b: Parses SKILL.md files into structured Skill objects
answer_c: Uploads skill files to the Hub

question: In that same starter, what is select_skills(...) responsible for?
answer_b: Choosing which skill names are relevant to the current user message

question: Why is system_prompt_for(...) a separate step from select_skills(...)?
answer_a: Selection reads short descriptions, while composition injects the full chosen skill bodies
answer_b: Claude Code requires two Python modules for every skill
answer_d: Skills cannot be loaded and composed in the same turn

question: What problem does the no-fluff skill fix in the Space exercise?
answer_c: Repeated disclaimer and filler text in demo code and UI

question: What is the most useful job for skill-creator in this unit?
answer_b: Optimizing a skill description so it triggers on realistic requests
answer_d: Publishing a Space without the Hub CLI

question: Which current command creates a Gradio Space repo on the Hub?
answer_a: huggingface-cli repo create your-demo --type space --space_sdk gradio
answer_b: hf repos create your-demo --repo-type space --space-sdk gradio

question: Why are small project-local skills often better than one giant catch-all skill?
answer_a: Claude Code ignores large skills entirely
answer_b: Small skills are easier to trigger, debug, and keep behavior-specific
answer_c: The Agent Skills specification forbids multi-section skills
answer_d: Only project-local skills can contain scripts
